response:
Sec. 1
People who are allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because the human body lacks gills to extract oxygen from water and because peanut allergens are not found in the ocean environment Sec. 2
The premise of the question is flawed since peanut allergies affect the immune system when ingesting or touching the nut rather than preventing a person from surviving in an aquatic habitat where peanuts do not naturally exist
